# Smart Productivity Dashboard for Remote Teams

## Project Overview
A lightweight, smart productivity dashboard built with:
- Frontend: React.js
- Backend: Node.js with Express
- Database: MySQL for reliable data persistence
- Real-time: Socket.io

## Features
- [x] Task Manager with Deadlines
- [x] Real-time Collaboration
- [x] Productivity Insights
- [x] Focus Timer (Pomodoro style)

## Architecture
- Client-server architecture with real-time websocket communication
- RESTful API for CRUD operations
- MySQL database for persistent data storage
- Responsive React frontend

## Development Status
- [x] Project scaffolded
- [ ] Backend setup
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Frontend components
- [ ] Real-time features
- [ ] Testing and deployment
